description: Coil-shot amperage worked as a live ledger: bar in a 5-turn low fill-factor coil (longitudinal flux, S/N poles, L=16 IN / D=2 IN callouts); STARTING POINT card runs L/D=8, NI=45,000/(L/D), 5,625 ampere-turns, then ammeter row /5 turns = 1,125 A; verification strip below with QQI shim blooming and gaussmeter sweeping to 45 G in the 30-60 G band, PROOF tag.
